announcements.title: 🌊 April 14th Meeting Recap with City Stormwater & More 🌊
announcements.content: A huge thank you to everyone who joined us for our meeting with Jonas and Emiliee from City Stormwater! Key takeaways: Diamond Lake is scheduled for a fresh inspection in August 2026 that will determine our dredging priority. We also voted to increase dues to $50/year starting in 2027 and approved fishing guest passes ($5 daily, $25 yearly).

announcements.title: Next BIG Civic League Meeting - April 14th
announcements.content: Join us Tuesday April 14th at 7pm at Virginia Wesleyan University. Public Works stormwater operations engineer Jonas Alered will be joining us to discuss how Diamond Lake needs to be dredged and how we fit within the priority list to get it done. Let's show up and be respectful of his time. Meeting location: Pearce Hospitality Room on campus of Virginia Wesleyan University.
